title: Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Quality Control Engineer with drive and ambition, Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Appliances Consulting Pvt Ltd!
